sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93797" key="shmanto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σημαν-τός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n93797.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">marked</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τροχαῖος</foreign> a trochee consisting of <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope> </bibl> + <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope> </bibl> time-units, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1140f</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
